message:
test(runtime): admin-command integration tests + pubsub/wait fixtures

crates/fr-runtime/tests/admin_commands_test.rs (+65):
 New integration test file covering:
  - CLIENT KILL target resolution by ID and by ADDR
  - CONFIG SET maxmemory change that triggers immediate sampling
  - SHUTDOWN NOSAVE cleanly tears down the event loop
 Tests exercise the runtime-facing admin surface rather than the
 command-parser layer.

core_pubsub.json:
 - PUBLISH while in subscription mode now expects the redis-format
   context error:
     "ERR Can't execute 'publish': only (P|S)SUBSCRIBE / (P|S)UNSUBSCRIBE
      / PING / QUIT / RESET are allowed in this context"
 - Multi-channel SUBSCRIBE response reshaped to match the redis
   per-channel RESP sequence (one 3-tuple per channel with the
   running subscription count).

core_wait.json:
 - WAIT with zero/zero-timeout and empty replica set now matches
   real redis by returning +0 (integer) instead of the earlier
   "ERR value is not an integer or out of range" fast-reject.

(The fr-runtime/src/lib.rs changes that these tests cover are
held back due to an active file reservation by another agent;
the fixtures and test file land here so they're ready when that
commit arrives.)
